languages.text: "Священный агрегат бездействовал многие годы. Наш долг как служителей Омниссии — продолжить взывать к нему, уповая на благосклонность Бога-Машины. Инициирую начало обряда".

traits.locale_text: "Священный агрегат бездействовал многие годы. Наш долг, как служителей Омниссии — продолжить взывать к нему, уповая на благосклонность Бога-Машины. Инициирую начало обряда".

languages.text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."
languages.original_text: "Священный агрегат бездействовал многие годы. Наш долг как служителей Омниссии — продолжить взывать к нему, уповая на благосклонность Бога-Машины. Инициирую начало обряда".

traits.locale_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

"The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

"The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

languages.text: 「聖なる機械は長年眠り続けてきた。我々オムニシアのしもべは、機械神のご慈悲を信じ、その呼びかけを続ける義務がある。儀式開始」
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

languages.text: "Kutsal mekanizma, uzun yıllardır uykuda. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları olarak görevimiz, Makine Tanrı'nın lütfuna güvenerek ona yakarmaya devam etmektir. Ayin başlatılıyor."
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal mekanizma, uzun yıllardır uykuda. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları olarak görevimiz, Makine Tanrı'nın lütfuna güvenerek ona yakarmaya devam etmektir. Ayin başlatılıyor."

languages.text: “此神圣机械已沉眠多年。身为欧姆尼赛亚之仆，我等的职责便是持续祈唤其苏醒，相信万机之神的慈悲。现在开始仪式。”
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

traits.locale_text: “此神圣机械已沉眠多年。身为欧姆尼赛亚之仆，我等的职责便是持续祈唤其苏醒，相信万机之神的慈悲。现在开始仪式。”

languages.text: "Der heilige Mechanismus hat viele Jahre lang geschlafen. Es ist unsere Pflicht als Diener des Omnissiah, ihn weiter anzurufen und an die Güte des Maschinengottes zu glauben. Initialisiere den Ritus."
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

traits.locale_text: "Der heilige Mechanismus hat viele Jahre lang geschlafen. Es ist unsere Pflicht als Diener des Omnissiah, ihn weiter anzurufen und an die Güte des Maschinengottes zu glauben. Initialisiere den Ritus."

languages.text: « Le mécanisme sacré est resté en sommeil pendant de nombreuses années. Il est de notre devoir, en tant que serviteurs de l'Omnimessie, de continuer à l'invoquer et de croire en la bienveillance du Dieu-Machine. Initialisation du rituel. »
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

traits.locale_text: « Le mécanisme sacré est resté en sommeil pendant de nombreuses années. Il est de notre devoir, en tant que serviteurs de l'Omnimessie, de continuer à l'invoquer et de croire en la bienveillance du Dieu-Machine. Initialisation du rituel. »

languages.text: «El mecanismo sagrado ha pasado muchos años en letargo. Como sirvientes del Omnissiah, es nuestra labor seguir invocándolo, confiando en la benevolencia del Dios Máquina. Iniciando fase inicial del rito».
languages.original_text: "The sacred mechanism has lain dormant for many years. It is our duty as servants of the Omnissiah to continue to invoke it, trusting in the benevolence of the Machine God. Initiating beginning of the rite."

traits.locale_text: «El mecanismo sagrado ha pasado muchos años en letargo. Como sirvientes del Omnissiah, es nuestra labor seguir invocándolo, confiando en la benevolencia del Dios Máquina. Iniciando fase inicial del rito».
